_fill: YOU fill this. Define your quality targets — performance, availability, consistency, scalability. These drive architecture decisions.

nonFunctionalRequirements.category: Availability | Performance | Consistency | Security | Scalability | Compliance
nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: State the requirement as a measurable target.
nonFunctionalRequirements.measurement: How will you measure this in production? (e.g. p95 latency via Prometheus histogram)

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: The core user action must complete in under X seconds at p95.
nonFunctionalRequirements.measurement: Histogram metric on the critical path service.

nonFunctionalRequirements.requirement: Describe your consistency requirement — e.g. no duplicate processing, no data loss between write and consume.
nonFunctionalRequirements.enforcement: How will this be enforced technically?
